text.title: experimentation-at-scale Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for experimentation-at-scale as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: HiPPO override: even with a clean readout, leadership ships the loser anyway. Without a written decision rule pre-committed by the exec sponsor, experimentation becomes theatre.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-register the decision rule, not just the metric — written, signed by sponsor, archived in Notion. Without this, "we won" becomes negotiable.

failure-mode.description: "Experiment to launch, not to learn": PM ships the variant once it crosses 95% CI without checking guardrails — guardrails fail, ops gets paged, trust in the platform erodes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Surface guardrail breaches BEFORE primary metric in the narrative. All readouts must enumerate stop-conditions and check SRM and power before reading lift.

failure-mode.description: Solution-shaped hypotheses: "we should add a banner" — the hypothesis carries the answer. PM agents must rewrite to behavioral if-then-because before any sample-size math runs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a behavioral if-then-because hypothesis. "Try a banner" is rejected; "If we surface plan upgrades in-context, then trial-to-paid will move +3% because friction at the upgrade moment is the bottleneck" is accepted.

failure-mode.description: Metric tunnel-vision: PM optimizes the KPI in their OKR; the experiment moves the KPI but cannibalizes a sibling team's metric. Cross-team guardrails are the fix, not heroic monitoring.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every experiment MUST enumerate guardrail metrics that represent adjacent team outcomes. Surface guardrail breaches before concluding the experiment won.

failure-mode.description: Local maxima: 18 months of CTA color tests yield 6% lift and zero strategic learning. Without an opportunity-tree-rooted slate, experimentation drifts to micro-optimizations.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tie every experiment to one opportunity-tree node; if it doesn't link, it's a CTA test, not product work — schedule, but cap to ≤25% of slate.

failure-mode.description: Prioritization blind spot: agents will rank by ICE without checking dependency on long-running platform work, then surface a "ship-now" candidate that needs a 6-week migration first.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feed the eng dep graph into the ranker prompt. ICE/RICE rankers will rank a 6-week dependency-locked experiment above a ready-to-go one because they ignore deps.

failure-mode.description: Reading outcomes wrong: "p=0.08, directionally positive" → ship. PM agents will defer to whichever framing matches the PM's prior unless forced to copy verbatim framework output.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin temperature ≤0.1 and force JSON output with explicit verdict enum. Readout-interpreter must check SRM and power before reading lift; reorder prompt to fail fast on invalid experiments.

failure-mode.description: Communication failure: a clean win in one segment, flat overall — PM ships globally citing "the win." Segmented readout is mandatory; segment cuts must be pre-registered to avoid p-hacking.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-register segment cuts (max 5). Post-hoc segments are exploratory only and labelled as such — never drive ship decisions. Surface all segment cuts in the decision narrative.

failure-mode.description: Agents will turn ambiguous PM intent ("can we improve activation?") into a hypothesis without flagging missing evidence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require a prior_evidence: field with at least 2 sources; hypothesis-author refuses to output if missing.

failure-mode.description: Readout-interpreter under temperature > 0.2 will narrate "directionally positive" on null results.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin temperature ≤0.1 and force JSON output with explicit verdict enum.

failure-mode.description: Decision rules drift between hypothesis-doc and readout — narrator agent should compute a hash of the hypothesis-doc at launch and refuse to render a ship memo if the hash changed.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hypothesis immutability is critical. If PM rewrites the decision rule after seeing the readout, the experiment is invalid.

failure-mode.description: ICE/RICE rankers will rank a 6-week dependency-locked experiment above a ready-to-go one because they ignore deps.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feed the eng dep graph into the ranker prompt.

failure-mode.description: Stakeholder-narrator will round confidence intervals into clean numbers ("4% lift, 95% confidence").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force verbatim copy of CI low/high; never paraphrase.

failure-mode.description: Learning-curator will hallucinate a pattern from N=2 closed experiments.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require N>=5 with shared opportunity-tree branch before emitting a "pattern" claim.

failure-mode.description: HiPPO leak: if the agent has access to leadership chat, it will weight comments as "evidence".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Keep prior_evidence sources to artifact links only (Dovetail study IDs, prior experiments, prototype tests). No Slack or email.

failure-mode.description: Readout-interpreter must check SRM and power before reading lift; reorder prompt to fail fast on invalid experiments.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Otherwise opus will write a nicely worded ship memo on a broken assignment.

failure-mode.description: Roadmap-impact-modeler will compound point estimates into 4-quarter forecasts and report them as fact.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require it to emit ranges and to label assumptions, never single-number forecasts.

failure-mode.description: PM-only ship/kill: agents must not auto-execute the ship action; gate at the flag-deployer step.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If autonomy is dialed up, require dual-key approval from PM and sponsor.

failure-mode.description: Translation drift (Ukrainian PM input ↔ English experiment doc): hypothesis-author should round-trip-translate the if-then-because and surface differences before approval.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Otherwise nuance about "first-value" or "activation" gets lost.

failure-mode.description: Token cost: readout-interpreter on a 12-segment readout balloons.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cap at 50k tokens; otherwise summarize segments first, then interpret.
